mapper.select:
SELECT
C."COMMENT_NUM" AS "commentNum", C."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", C."MEMBER_NUM" AS "memberNum", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName", C."COMMENT_CONTENTS" AS "commentContents", C."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" C
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON C."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM"
WHERE C."BOARD_NUM" = #{boardNum}
ORDER BY C."COMMENT_NUM" ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" ( "BOARD_NUM", "MEMBER_NUM", "COMMENT_CONTENTS", "CREATE_DATE" ) VALUES ( #{boardNum}, #{memberNum}, #{commentContents}, NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
